extraction_reasoning: No litigation summary table is provided in the supplied risk section. The disclosed criminal writ petition was filed by the Company and a Promoter, so it is a “By” matter and was excluded; the SEBI complaints are not stated as statutory/regulatory enforcement proceedings against the Company, and no tax proceedings are disclosed. The contingent-liabilities table states a Total of ₹25.62 million as of September 30, 2021; this stated figure was used without re-summing, converted at ₹10 million per crore to ₹2.562 crore. The section gives company-wide revenue concentration for customers accounting for 80% of revenue, but does not disclose top-five or top-ten customer percentages; the disclosed market/segment percentages are not customer concentration. The source currency unit is million, and the contingent-liability conversion is ₹25.62 million ÷ 10 = ₹2.562 crore.
